stemHtml: In a precision approach, the FAP is the point…

options.a: on the final approach track where the intermediate approach altitude/height intercepts the nominal glide path.
options.b: marking the end of the initial segment and the start of the intermediate segment.
options.c: at which the missed approach must be initiated for minimum obstacle clearance.
options.d: on the final approach track permitting configuration selection and descent from intermediate altitude to the MDA.
